examples: The subjects were asked to use their free right hand point with a baton to the location of each knuckle and fingertip of their left hand.
Officers continued a fingertip search of the area yesterday.
My split fingertip is bleeding on my keyboard.
And Bunn produced a fine fingertip save late on to divert Camara's strike onto the post.
It seems that every Milanese businessman wears a quilted, fingertip-length jacket over his suit.
